what_was_built: reports/portfolio_capital_efficiency_protocol_v1/protocol.json (machine-readable Portfolio Capital-Efficiency protocol: lane scope, C10 boundary, frozen-only input sources, 5 capital-efficiency metrics [definition-only], 4 allocation baselines, P0..P8 phases, PASS/WATCH/FAIL, kill conditions, no-profit-claim policy)
tests/test_portfolio_capital_efficiency_protocol.py (25 tests covering schema + safety + C10 boundary + validator failure modes)

distinction_phrases_required_in_md: A capital-efficiency score does not imply future returns
An advisory allocation is not an execution instruction
No allocation is authorized by this protocol alone

c10_protection_record.c10_working_tree_state: untouched (pre-existing M on tools/c10_real_candle_detection_once.py and tests/test_c10_real_candle_detection_once_runner_purity.py left exactly as found)

registry_integration.note: This bundle intentionally did NOT modify tools/strategy_candidate_registry.py or any shared registry logic, to honor the additive-only / surgical-change scope. The lane self-declares WATCH inside its own protocol.json (lane_status_self_declared). Wiring a candidate seed into the shared registry is a separate, separately-authorized step.

recommended_next_bundle: Portfolio Capital-Efficiency Input Contract v1 (P1) -- which frozen artifacts are admissible + freeze rules; spec only, no read run
Portfolio Capital-Efficiency Metric Spec v1 (P2) -- exact formulas + inputs per metric; spec only, nothing computed
Portfolio Capital-Efficiency Allocation Baseline Spec v1 (P3) -- reference models + concentration cap; spec only
no_profit_claim: This protocol does not imply edge and does not allocate capital.
A capital-efficiency score does not imply future returns.
An advisory allocation memo is a human-review aid, never an execution instruction.
No allocation is authorized by this protocol alone.
